LABEL: SIGNUP_OK
lifted_nl: whenever signup(u,p,role) is called, it must hold that u ∉ dom(R); always after signup(u,p,role) succeeds, R becomes R ∪ {u → hash(p)}
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M ∪ {u → hash(p)} AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: LOGIN_OK
lifted_nl: whenever login(u,p) is called, it must hold that p = hash(inv(R)(u)) ∧ u ∉ dom(T); always after login(u) succeeds, T is added to map {token → u}
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T ∪ {token → u} AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: LOGOUT_OK
lifted_nl: whenever logout(token) is called, it must hold that token ∈ dom(T); always after logout(token) succeeds, token is removed from T
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T - {token} AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: SUBMIT_ONBOARDING_STEP_K_OK
lifted_nl: whenever submit_onboarding_step_k(p) is called, it must hold that p's state = STEP_k and p's session token is in dom(T); always after submit_onboarding_step_k(p) succeeds, p's state becomes STEP_(k+1); after submit_onboarding_step_6(p) succeeds, p's state becomes ONBOARD_DONE
Precondition: p's state = STEP_k AND p's session token in dom(T)
Postcondition: Qual'=Qual union {p|->STEP_(k+1)} AND T'=T AND C'=C AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: INITIAL_QUALIFICATION_APPLICATION_OK
lifted_nl: whenever InitialQualificationApplication(p) is called, it must hold that QualState(p) = Q_INIT; always after InitialQualificationApplication(p) succeeds, QualState(p) becomes UNDER_EXAM
Postcondition: Qual'=Qual union {p|->UNDER_EXAM} AND T'=T AND C'=C AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: SEMI_QUALIFY_OK
lifted_nl: whenever SemiQualify(p) is called, it must hold that QualState(p) = UNDER_EXAM; always whenever Semi-Qualify(p) is called, QualState becomes TRAINING
Postcondition: Qual'=Qual union {p|->TRAINING} AND T'=T AND C'=C AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: FULLY_QUALIFY_OK
lifted_nl: whenever Fully-Qualify(p) is called, it must hold that QualState = UNDER_EXAM; always whenever Fully-Qualify(p) succeeds, QualState becomes ACTIVE
Postcondition: Qual'=Qual union {p|->ACTIVE} AND T'=T AND C'=C AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: DISQUALIFY_OK
lifted_nl: whenever Disqualify(p) is called, it must hold that QualState(p) = UNDER_EXAM; always after Disqualify(p) succeeds, QualState(p) becomes REJECTED
Postcondition: Qual'=Qual union {p|->REJECTED} AND T'=T AND C'=C AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: SUSPEND_PLUMBER_OK
lifted_nl: whenever SuspendPlumber(p) is called, it must hold that QualState(p) = ACTIVE; always after SuspendPlumber(p) succeeds, QualState becomes SUSPENDED
Postcondition: Qual'=Qual union {p|->SUSPENDED} AND T'=T AND C'=C AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: REINSTATE_PLUMBER_OK
lifted_nl: whenever ReinstatePlumber(p) is called, it must hold that QualState = SUSPENDED and always after ReinstatePlumber(p) succeeds, QualState becomes ACTIVE
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual union {p|->ACTIVE} AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: RAISE_COMPLAINT_OK
lifted_nl: always after RaiseComplaint() succeeds, Compl is added to map {id -> ComplaintRecord} where ComplaintRecord.state = RAISED
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {id|->ComplaintRecord(state=RAISED)}

LABEL: ASSIGN_PLUMBER_OK
lifted_nl: whenever AssignPlumberToComplaint() is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord.state = RAISED and whenever AssignPlumberToComplaint(p) is called, it must hold that Qual(p) = ACTIVE and always after AssignPlumberToComplaint(plumberId) succeeds, ComplaintRecord is updated such that ComplaintRecord.plumber becomes plumberId and ComplaintRecord.state becomes ASSIGNED
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {complaintId|->ComplaintRecord(plumber=plumberId, state=ASSIGNED)}

LABEL: PLUMBER_ACCEPTS_ASSIGNMENT_OK
lifted_nl: whenever PlumberAcceptsAssignment is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord.state = ASSIGNED and ComplaintRecord.plumber = callingPlumber; always after PlumberAcceptsAssignment succeeds, ComplaintRecord.state becomes UNDER_EXAM_C
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {c|->Compl(c) with state=UNDER_EXAM_C}

LABEL: PLUMBER_REJECTS_ASSIGNMENT_OK
lifted_nl: whenever PlumberRejectsAssignment(c,p) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord.state = ASSIGNED and ComplaintRecord.plumber = p; always after PlumberRejectsAssignment(c,p) succeeds, ComplaintRecord.state becomes RAISED and ComplaintRecord.plumber is removed from ComplaintRecord
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {c|->Compl(c) with state=RAISED, plumber=undefined}

LABEL: RAISE_QUOTATION_OK
lifted_nl: whenever RaiseQuotation(c,p) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord.state = UNDER_EXAM_C; always after RaiseQuotation(c,p,m) succeeds, ComplaintRecord becomes ComplaintRecord with quotation field set to items and state becomes QUOTATION_RAISED
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {c|->Compl(c) with quotation=m, state=QUOTATION_RAISED}

LABEL: APPROVE_QUOTATION_OK
lifted_nl: whenever ApproveQuotation(c,p,m) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord's state is QUOTATION_RAISED; always after ApproveQuotation(c,p,m) succeeds, ComplaintRecord's state becomes UNDER_EXEC
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {c|->ComplaintRecord.state = UNDER_EXEC}

LABEL: REJECT_QUOTATION_ABANDON_OK
lifted_nl: whenever RejectQuotationAbandon() is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord.state = QUOTATION_RAISED; always after RejectQuotationAbandon() succeeds, ComplaintRecord.state becomes ABANDONED
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {c|->ComplaintRecord.state = ABANDONED}

LABEL: MARK_TASK_COMPLETED_OK
lifted_nl: whenever MarkTaskCompleted() is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord.state = UNDER_EXEC; always after Mark Task Completed, ComplaintRecord becomes PAYMENT_PENDING
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {c|->ComplaintRecord.state = PAYMENT_PENDING}

LABEL: MAKE_PAYMENT_OK
lifted_nl: whenever Make Payment is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord = PAYMENT_PENDING; always after Make Payment succeeds, ComplaintRecord becomes DONE
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {complaintId|->ComplaintRecord.state=DONE}

LABEL: SUBMIT_FEEDBACK_OK
lifted_nl: whenever submitFeedback(c,p,complaintId) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord[complaintId] = DONE; always after submitFeedback(c,p,complaintId) succeeds, ComplaintRecord[complaintId] becomes ComplaintRecord[complaintId] with feedback recorded
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {complaintId|->ComplaintRecord[complaintId] with feedback recorded}
